meta.title: CD Espanol Wiesbaden
meta.description: Heritage-led club website for CD Espanol Wiesbaden built on a modern Nuxt UI foundation.

footer.themeNote: Heritage Blue x Coral theme with Nuxt UI

hero.title: Tradition on a modern Nuxt UI foundation
hero.description: The theme follows the styling.md guidelines: Heritage Blue, coral accents, clear sans-serif typography and subtle Las Cortinas stripes.
hero.panelDescription: A visual system for header, buttons, cards and footer that keeps the club identity from feeling like a generic SaaS template.

guidelines.title: Theme guidelines
guidelines.description: The Nuxt UI base has been aligned with the brand characteristics described in styling.md.

heritage.title: 1981 heritage
heritage.description: A presence that makes the club history tangible while still feeling contemporary.

coral.title: Coral as accent
coral.description: Primary actions, badges and call-to-actions consistently use the heritage coral tone.

stripes.title: Las Cortinas stripes
stripes.description: The vertical stripe idea continues subtly in backgrounds and section dividers.

firstTeam.title: First team
firstTeam.description: Matchday communication is clearly prioritised with strong call-to-action areas and a calm information hierarchy.

youth.title: Youth
youth.description: A welcoming card style with soft border treatments and strong readability on mobile devices.

club.title: Club
club.description: Calm neutral text surfaces help history, membership and organisation feel trustworthy.

cta.title: Nuxt UI now follows the CDE identity
cta.description: Primary colours, typography, surfaces and decorative patterns are centrally defined and ready to be reused on further pages.
